lines.speaker: Meddwl Ymlaen Llaw
lines.text: Hey! What can I do for ya' today?

lines.speaker: Meddwl Ymlaen Llaw
lines.text: I'm Meddwl, a simple forest dweller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's nice to meet you Meddwl, I'm [player name].

lines.speaker: Meddwl Ymlaen Llaw
lines.text: And it's great to meet you, [player name].

lines.speaker: Meddwl Ymlaen Llaw
lines.text: I'm new here, I recently left my home of Gwenith.

lines.speaker: Meddwl Ymlaen Llaw
lines.text: Gwenith may be in the forest, it is not part of the forest. I desired to be closer to nature.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A lovely idea, how's it going?

lines.speaker: Meddwl Ymlaen Llaw
lines.text: It's a harder living without the protection of four walls and a roof, but the peace is a wonderful thing to behold. Just listen...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It is! I feel almost lighter.

lines.speaker: Meddwl Ymlaen Llaw
lines.text: That's your demons flittering away, taken by the cool breeze of nature.

lines.speaker: Meddwl Ymlaen Llaw
lines.text: Any who, was there anything else you wanted?
